title: Mark Palmer
compiled_truth: Mark Palmer is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2001-10-02), Mark Palmer sent 72 and received 1550 emails, totalling 1622 interactions. Top correspondents: [Steven Kean](people/steven-kean) (47), [Richard Shapiro](people/richard-shapiro) (26), [Karen Denne](people/karen-denne) (19), [Jeff Dasovich](people/jeff-dasovich) (16), [James Steffes](people/james-steffes) (15). Mailbox folders observed: _americas, aadepartment, advertising, california_campaign, deleted_items.
